# click

Tap by coordinates, ref, or selector

## Usage

```bash
agent-device click <x y|@ref|selector>
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--count <n>`: Repeat count for press/swipe series
- `--interval-ms <ms>`: Delay between press iterations
- `--hold-ms <ms>`: Press hold duration for each iteration
- `--jitter-px <n>`: Deterministic coordinate jitter radius for press
- `--double-tap`: Use double-tap gesture per press iteration
- `--button primary|secondary|middle`: Click: choose mouse button (middle reserved for future macOS support)
- `--depth, -d <depth>`: Snapshot: limit snapshot depth
- `--scope, -s <scope>`: Snapshot: scope snapshot to label/identifier
- `--raw`: Snapshot: raw node output

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
